commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps Telegram rich send and rich edit calls in `extensions/telegram/src/send.ts` with a legacy HTML `sendMessage`/`editMessageText` fallback when rich API calls throw.

PR surface: Source +37. Total +37 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main sends and records each rich chunk inside the helper, while the PR catch would replay the full legacy plan after any later chunk failure. No live Telegram fallback reproduction was supplied.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for real Telegram proof and a side-effect-safe implementation; this should not be sent to automated repair while the external proof gate is missing.

target.title: feat(telegram): add sendRichMessage fallback to legacy sendMessage
